hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(tsx|jsx)$ ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REACT FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the react-reviewer agent to review this change before proceeding."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.py$ ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PYTHON FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the python-reviewer agent to review this change before proceeding."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]] && [[ "$FILE" =~ (test_[^/]*\.py|[^/]*_test\.py|[^/]*\.test\.[jt]sx?|[^/]*\.spec\.[jt]sx?|[^/]*_test\.go|[^/]*_test\.rs|[^/]*_spec\.rb|[^/]*_test\.rb|[^/]*Test\.java|[^/]*Tests?\.cs|(__tests__|tests?|spec|specs)/) ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"TEST FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the test-reviewer agent to review test quality before proceeding."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(m?js|cjs|ts)$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ \.(tsx|jsx)$ ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"TS/JS FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the ts-reviewer agent to review this change before proceeding."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(sh|bash|zsh)$ ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"SHELL SCRIPT MODIFIED: %s — Use the shell-reviewer agent to review this change before proceeding."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$BASENAME" ]] && [[ "$BASENAME" =~ ^(auth|login|session|token|permission|rbac|acl|middleware|guard|policy|password|credential|oauth|saml|jwt|crypto|encrypt|decrypt|hash|secret|security|cors|csrf|sanitiz|upload|webhook|callback|redirect|proxy|gateway|rate.?limit|admin|privilege|role|route|controller|handler|endpoint|api|server)\. ]] && [[ "$BASENAME" =~ \.(py|ts|js|mjs|cjs|go|rb|java|rs|php)$ ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"SECURITY-SENSITIVE FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the security-reviewer agent to review this change for vulnerabilities."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$BASENAME" ]] && [[ "$BASENAME" =~ ^(model|schema|entity|migration|log|logger|logging|analytics|tracking|telemetry|user|profile|account|customer|patient|employee|pii|gdpr|consent|export|report|serializer|response|presenter|transformer|dto)\. ]] && [[ "$BASENAME" =~ \.(py|ts|js|mjs|cjs|go|rb|java|rs|php)$ ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"DATA/PRIVACY-SENSITIVE FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the privacy-reviewer agent to review PII handling."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" ]]; then CONTENT=$(head -20 "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE '(import\s+(anthropic|openai|langchain|llama_index|transformers|cohere|replicate|together)|from\s+(anthropic|openai|langchain|llama_index|transformers|cohere|replicate|together)|require\(.*(anthropic|openai|langchain)\))'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"AI/LLM SDK FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the ai-security-reviewer agent to review for OWASP LLM Top 10 vulnerabilities."}}' "$FILE"; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for AI SDK file changes...

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$BASENAME" ]] && { [[ "$BASENAME" =~ ^(go\.mod|go\.sum|Gemfile|Gemfile\.lock|Pipfile|build\.gradle)$ ]] || [[ "$BASENAME" =~ ^(package|package-lock|requirements|Pipfile|pyproject|setup|Cargo|pom|composer)\. ]]; }; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"DEPENDENCY FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the dependency-reviewer agent to review supply chain changes."}}' "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$BASENAME" ]] && [[ "$BASENAME" =~ ^(handler|controller|route|endpoint|server|worker|consumer|processor|job|service|api|app)\. ]] && [[ "$BASENAME" =~ \.(py|ts|js|mjs|cjs|go|rb|java|rs|php)$ ]]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"SERVICE FILE MODIFIED: %s — Use the observability-reviewer agent to check instrumentation coverage."}}' "$FILE"; fi

hooks.statusMessage: Checking for security-sensitive changes before push...
